name: Common mistakes to avoid in Utah occupational illness claims?

mainEntity.name: Common mistakes to avoid in Utah occupational illness claims?

acceptedAnswer.text: Delay reporting, skip exams, hasty signs.[4]
acceptedAnswer.description: Don’t delay reporting, miss exams, sign without review, ignore pre-existing proof.[3][4] Key factors: (1) No witnesses fatal? No, use meds; (2) Talking adjuster alone; (3) Allen Rule overlook.[1][3] Document all, get lawyer early; secures benefits.[1] Avoid denials.

description: Delay reporting, skip exams, hasty signs.[4]
